title: CfrAncestor
description: An ancestor node in the CFR hierarchy as returned by GET /api/versioner/v1/ancestry/{date}/title-{title}.json.

type.description: The type of this hierarchy node.

label.description: Full human-readable label for this node (e.g., 'Title 2 - Federal Financial Assistance').

label_description.description: Descriptive portion of the label (e.g., 'Federal Financial Assistance').

identifier.description: Identifier for this node within its type (e.g., '2', 'A', 'I', '200').
